title: paul russells White Plastic Kettle - 1.7L Capacity, Perfect for 7 Cups, Family Size, Clear Water Window, LED Indicator, 2200w Quite boil, Sleek and Simple, Boil Dry Protection, Cord-free Serving.
features: 3-Year Warranty for Peace of Mind – Paul Russell's 2200W 1.7L White Kettle has a reassuring 3-year warranty, subject to online registration, ensuring protection against unforeseen issues. Invest confidently in a kettle designed for longevity.

Generously Sized for Families – This kettle has a 1.7-litre capacity, allowing for the efficient water boiling for 6-7 cups in one cycle. Its extra-wide lid enables easy filling, and the visible water level indicator ensures convenience for families.
Advanced Safety Features – This 2200W kettle has overheating protection and automatically shuts off at boiling point. The illuminated power indicator enhances safety.
Easy-to-Clean with Removable Filter – The removable filter is easy to clean with water, maintaining water freshness and preventing limescale buildup to extend the kettle's lifespan.
Timeless and Elegant Design – Presenting a classic plastic design adorned with a chrome band, this kettle bestows an element of timeless refinement upon your kitchen decor.
description: Product Description paul russells Electric Plastic Kettle - 1.7 Litre, 2200-Watts fast Boil power Introducing the Paul Russells 2200W 1.7L White Kettle. This kettle has a generous 1.7-litre capacity, which can boil 6-7 cups in one go, making it perfect for families. It features a wide lid for easy filling and a visible water level indicator for added convenience. Safety is a top priority with advanced features like overheating protection and an illuminated power indicator light. The removable filter makes maintenance easy, preventing limescale buildup and extending the kettle's lifespan. Its classic plastic design, accented by a chrome band, adds a touch of timeless elegance to any kitchen space.
